### Q1 2025
The QCi team continued to drive progress in the first quarter, with announcements on the chip foundry and quantum machines.
[](https://quantumcomputinginc-8608404.hs-sites.com/qcinewsletterjune2025)
![](https://images.ctfassets.net/i1dyhzbyi8ad/23RixLJDjX80PBZHILYIcS/2278f7f6adc1fb8058d180347d19cd0d/Newsletter-Qatar.jpg)
### January 2025
From the 47th presidential inauguration in Washington, D.C. to Qatar to California, QCi has been across the globe this month. The company was also pleased to announce new purchase orders for its TFLN photonic chip foundry.
[](https://quantumcomputinginc-8608404.hs-sites.com/qci-newsletter-january-2025)
![](https://images.ctfassets.net/i1dyhzbyi8ad/24DW3YQDEVSFtQcHyhNVnI/4b8c19ff467c0f1d04bebb5f49dc5704/Newsletter_-_Webinar.jpg)
### July EQC Webinar
QCi announces its upcoming webinar, “Beyond Qubos: Efficient Quantum Optimization," where QCi's experts will dive deeper into entropy computing and accessible quantum optimization machines for non-convex and combinatorial problems.
[](https://quantumcomputinginc-8608404.hs-sites.com/save-the-date-qci-webinar-beyond-qubos?ecid=ACsprvvlpKEFc0WYJ1-n3tglVG3dzJBh2tM0dgfV3w-3k9XMVw3yDrrSCxNa81Aim-DsrK9E166R&utm_medium=email&_hsmi=317295966&utm_content=317295966&utm_source=hs_email)

## Resources
### FAQs
### 
##### What is the value of QCi with QPhoton?
The combination of QCi and QPhoton delivers the first ready-to-run broadly accessible and affordable quantum photonic systems (QPS) that can be used by non-quantum experts, anywhere, for real-world business applications.
Qatalyst is a ready-to-run quantum optimization software that can be used to solve complex computations by today’s business experts and programmers, with no need for an elite workforce trained in highly specialized, complex and expensive quantum dev development for algorithms, software and orchestration. Qatalyst also delivers vendor-neutral access to a wide range of QPUs and CPUs with no hardware/vendor lock-in.
QPhoton’s QPU is a ready-to-run photonic system that delivers a dramatically lower, highly affordable TCO-Q, enabling a much broader range of deployment scenarios by today’s business users. These QPUs can be deployed anywhere, run at room temperature, are stable in most environments and maintain coherence. Contrast this to early NISC QPUs that require supercomputer-like TCO-Q and deployment due to hyper-cooling, instability wrt environmental interference and issues with decoherence.
### 
##### What value does QCi deliver to the market?
The blending of Qatalyst and QPhoton dramatically expands QCi’s addressable market for quantum computing, enabling a diverse set of businesses to be able to afford and use quantum computers. This accelerates and expands quantum adoption beyond today’s expensive and highly specialized quantum computers from alternative vendors.
QPhoton brings innovative photonic quantum computers to QCi. They flexibly process as a Photonic QC, a Gate Model QC or as an annealing QC. This enables QCi to solve a wide range of quantum problems for a variety of applications with a ready-to-run, significantly lower cost quantum system.
### 
##### Why would a software company buy a hardware company?
The blending of Qatalyst and QPhoton dramatically expands QCi’s addressable market for quantum computing, enabling a diverse set of businesses to be able to afford and use quantum computers. This accelerates and expands quantum adoption beyond today’s expensive and highly specialized quantum computers from alternative vendors.
QPhoton brings innovative photonic quantum computers to QCi. They flexibly process as a Photonic QC, a Gate Model QC or as an annealing QC. This enables QCi to solve a wide range of quantum problems for a variety of applications with a ready-to-run, significantly lower cost quantum system.
### 
##### What is Quantum Computing Inc.’s stock symbol?
Our stock is traded on NASDAQ under the symbol QUBT.

css-1b8uc0m"><h5 class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-h5 css-hwstpx">What is the value of QCi with QPhoton?</h5></span><span class="MuiAccordionSummary-expandIconWrapper css-f8wb7g"><svg class="MuiSvgIcon-root MuiSvgIcon-fontSizeMedium css-q7mezt" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="24" height="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M7 10L12 15L17 10H7Z"></path></svg></span></button></h3><div style="min-height:0px" class="MuiCollapse-root MuiCollapse-vertical MuiCollapse-hidden css-abqyn"><div class="MuiCollapse-wrapper MuiCollapse-vertical css-15830to"><div class="MuiCollapse-wrapperInner MuiCollapse-vertical css-9vd5ud"><div role="region" class="MuiAccordion-region css-1xdhyk6"><div class="MuiAccordionDetails-root css-1dmpowm"><div class="MuiPaper-root MuiPaper-elevation MuiPaper-rounded MuiPaper-elevation1 MuiCard-root css-wfeu5z" style="--Paper-shadow:0px 2px 1px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2),0px 1px 1px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.14),0px 1px 3px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)"><div class="MuiCardContent-root css-d6a9l8"><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">The combination of QCi and QPhoton delivers the first ready-to-run broadly accessible and affordable quantum photonic systems (QPS) that can be used by non-quantum experts, anywhere, for real-world business applications.</p><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">Qatalyst is a ready-to-run quantum optimization software that can be used to solve complex computations by today’s business experts and programmers, with no need for an elite workforce trained in highly specialized, complex and expensive quantum dev development for algorithms, software and orchestration. Qatalyst also delivers vendor-neutral access to a wide range of QPUs and CPUs with no hardware/vendor lock-in.</p><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">QPhoton’s QPU is a ready-to-run photonic system that delivers a dramatically lower, highly affordable TCO-Q, enabling a much broader range of deployment scenarios by today’s business users. These QPUs can be deployed anywhere, run at room temperature, are stable in most environments and maintain coherence. Contrast this to early NISC QPUs that require supercomputer-like TCO-Q and deployment due to hyper-cooling, instability wrt environmental interference and issues with decoherence.</p></div><div class="MuiCardActions-root MuiCardActions-spacing css-y2c0t2"></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="MuiPaper-root MuiPaper-elevation MuiPaper-rounded MuiPaper-elevation1 MuiAccordion-root MuiAccordion-rounded MuiAccordion-gutters css-15mduax" style="--Paper-shadow:0px 2px 1px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2),0px 1px 1px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.14),0px 1px 3px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)"><h3 class="MuiAccordion-heading css-wnfue5"><button class="MuiButtonBase-root MuiAccordionSummary-root MuiAccordionSummary-gutters css-3pzm2w" tabindex="0" type="button" aria-expanded="false"><span market?</h5></span><span class="MuiAccordionSummary-expandIconWrapper css-f8wb7g"><svg class="MuiSvgIcon-root MuiSvgIcon-fontSizeMedium css-q7mezt" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="24" height="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M7 10L12 15L17 10H7Z"></path></svg></span></button></h3><div style="min-height:0px" class="MuiCollapse-root MuiCollapse-vertical MuiCollapse-hidden css-abqyn"><div class="MuiCollapse-wrapper MuiCollapse-vertical css-15830to"><div class="MuiCollapse-wrapperInner MuiCollapse-vertical css-9vd5ud"><div role="region" class="MuiAccordion-region css-1xdhyk6"><div class="MuiAccordionDetails-root css-1dmpowm"><div class="MuiPaper-root MuiPaper-elevation MuiPaper-rounded MuiPaper-elevation1 MuiCard-root css-wfeu5z" MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">The blending of Qatalyst and QPhoton dramatically expands QCi’s addressable market for quantum computing, enabling a diverse set of businesses to be able to afford and use quantum computers. This accelerates and expands quantum adoption beyond today’s expensive and highly specialized quantum computers from alternative vendors.</p><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">QPhoton brings innovative photonic quantum computers to QCi. They flexibly process as a Photonic QC, a Gate Model QC or as an annealing QC. This enables QCi to solve a wide range of quantum problems for a variety of applications with a ready-to-run, significantly lower cost quantum system.</p></div><div class="MuiCardActions-root QPhoton?\",\"image\":null,\"content\":[[\"$\",\"$L2d\",\"0\",{\"sx\":{\"display\":\"flex\",\"flexDirection\":\"column\",\"background\":\"white\"},\"children\":[null,[\"$\",\"$L40\",null,{\"sx\":{\"flexGrow\":1,\"overflow\":\"auto\",\"\u003e:first-child\":{\"m\":0}},\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L23\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The combination of QCi and QPhoton delivers the first ready-to-run broadly accessible and affordable quantum photonic systems (QPS) that can be used by non-quantum experts, anywhere, for real-world business applications.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L23\",\"p-1\",{\"children\":\"Qatalyst is a ready-to-run quantum optimization software that can be used to solve complex computations by today’s business experts and programmers, with no need for an elite workforce trained in highly specialized, complex and expensive quantum dev development for algorithms, software and orchestration. Qatalyst also delivers vendor-neutral access to a wide range of QPUs and CPUs with no hardware/vendor lock-in.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L23\",\"p-2\",{\"children\":\"QPhoton’s QPU is a ready-to-run photonic system that delivers a dramatically lower, highly affordable TCO-Q, enabling a much broader range of deployment scenarios by today’s business users. These QPUs can be deployed anywhere, run at room temperature, are stable in most environments and maintain coherence. Contrast this to early NISC QPUs that require supercomputer-like TCO-Q and deployment due to hyper-cooling, instability wrt environmental interference and issues with decoherence.\"}]]}],[\"$\",\"$L2b\",null,{\"sx\":{\"display\":\"flex\",\"flexDirection\":{\"xs\":\"column\",\"sm\":\"row\"},\"alignItems\":\"stretch\",\"justifyContent\":\"start\",\"gap\":\"4px\",\"p\":1,\"pt\":0},\"children\":[]}]]}]]},{\"title\":\"What value does QCi deliver to the market?\",\"image\":null,\"content\":[[\"$\",\"$L2d\",\"0\",{\"sx\":{\"display\":\"flex\",\"flexDirection\":\"column\",\"background\":\"white\"},\"children\":[null,[\"$\",\"$L40\",null,{\"sx\":{\"flexGrow\":1,\"overflow\":\"auto\",\"\u003e:first-child\":{\"m\":0}},\"children\":[[\"$\",\"$L23\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The blending of Qatalyst and QPhoton dramatically expands QCi’s addressable market for quantum computing, enabling a diverse set of businesses to be able to afford and use quantum computers. This accelerates and expands quantum adoption beyond today’s expensive and highly specialized quantum computers from alternative vendors.\"}],[\"$\",\"$L23\",\"p-1\",{\"children\":\"QPhoton brings innovative photonic quantum computers to QCi.
